# blastshield_event_log_rules (Data Source)

Lists Blastshield event_log_rules with optional filters.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all event log rules
data "blastshield_event_log_rules" "all" {}

# Filter event log rules by name
data "blastshield_event_log_rules" "auth_alerts" {
  name = ["alert-on-failed-auth"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `actions` (List of String) Filter by actions.
- `apply_to_groups` (List of Number) Filter by apply_to_groups.
- `email_recipients` (List of String) Filter by email_recipients.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Filter by enabled.
- `id` (List of Number) Filter by id.
- `name` (List of String) Filter by name.
- `system_tags` (List of String) Filter by system_tags.
- `tags` (List of String) Filter by tags.

### Read-Only

- `event_log_rules` (Attributes List) List of event_log_rules matching the filters. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--event_log_rules))

<a id="nestedatt--event_log_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `event_log_rules`

Read-Only:

- `actions` (Set of String)
- `apply_to_groups` (Set of Number)
- `conditions` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--event_log_rules--conditions))
- `email_recipients` (Set of String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `system_tags` (Map of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--event_log_rules--conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `event_log_rules.conditions`

Read-Only:

- `condition_type` (String)
- `operator` (String)
- `value` (String)
